description: Phase 1 centerpiece: NeonCart health, top use cases / specialists / tools, gen_ai token + cost usage, Sigil generation events, and the featured mice-rca trace pivot.

panels.title: 🏥 Health — is NeonCart up and meeting SLOs?

panels.description: Total request rate to NeonCart from OTel span metrics (5m window). The basic 'is anyone shopping?' pulse.
panels.title: How much traffic is hitting NeonCart? (req/s)

panels.description: Share of NeonCart spans marked STATUS_CODE_ERROR over all spans (5m). Yellow above 1%, red above 5%. Anything red and you have a user-visible incident.
panels.title: ⚠ Are requests failing? (error rate)

panels.description: 95% of NeonCart requests finish in under this many seconds (OTel span metrics, 5m window). Yellow above 1s, red above 3s — the slow tail your users feel.
panels.title: How slow is the slow tail? (p95 latency)

panels.description: Worst-case latency floor — 99% of requests finish under this. Same OTel span metrics, 5m. Use alongside p95 to see how bad the worst 1% is.
panels.title: How bad is the worst 1%? (p99 latency)

panels.description: Live list of any Grafana alerts in firing/pending/error state tied to this dashboard. If empty, nothing's on fire.
panels.title: 🚨 What's on fire? (active alerts)
🔍 Trace explorer — pivot from metric to span tree

panels.description: Recent NeonCart traces filtered by the use_case dropdown above. Click any row to open the full span tree in Tempo.
panels.title: Recent traces — pick one to inspect (use_case=$use_case)

panels.description: The Phase-1 centerpiece. Each row is one 'show me mice' chat that hit an UndefinedColumn (rodent_qty) error in the pg.query tool span. Click a row to walk the span tree from chat → tool → failing SQL.
panels.title: 🐭 Show me mice — failing traces (the centerpiece pivot)
📦 Specialists — which nc-* agents are doing the work?

panels.description: Per-specialist call rate over time (gen_ai token usage as a proxy for invocations). One line per nc-* agent: nc-chatbot, nc-product-finder, etc. Filtered by the use_case dropdown.
panels.title: Which specialist is taking the load? (rate by specialist)

panels.description: p95 LLM call duration per nc-* specialist (gen_ai_client_operation_duration histogram). Spot one slow agent dragging down user experience even when overall p95 looks fine.
panels.title: Which specialist is slow? (p95 latency by specialist)

panels.description: Ranked leaderboard of nc-* specialists by total invocations in the last hour. Bar = volume. Use to see which agent the router is leaning on hardest.
panels.title: 🔥 Top specialists by volume (last 1h)
🛠 Tool calls — which functions are agents invoking?

panels.description: Per-tool invocation rate over time, from OTel span metrics. Tools include get_inventory, search_products, place_order, etc. — one line each.
panels.title: Which tools are being called and how often?

panels.description: Per-tool error ratio (failed spans / total spans) over 5m. Yellow above 5%, red above 20%. Red bars are the tools dragging down agent reliability — typically get_inventory during the mice-rca demo.
panels.title: ⚠ Which tools are failing? (error rate by tool)
🤖 LLM gateway — tokens and dollars going through Sigil

panels.description: Stacked tokens/sec per model, split into input and output. Drawn from gen_ai.client.token.usage (OTel GenAI semconv). Use to see whether reads or writes dominate, and which model is doing the talking.
panels.title: How many tokens per model, input vs output?

panels.description: NeonCart spend rate projected to **USD per hour** (5m rate × 3600) — total line plus a breakdown per model. Sigil applies canonical Anthropic/OpenAI pricing to compute gen_ai_client_cost_USD_total. Multiply any value by 24 for daily, by 720 for monthly.
panels.title: 💰 What's the burn rate? — USD per hour, total and per model

panels.description: All-up NeonCart LLM bill for the past hour (sum of gen_ai_client_cost_USD_total across nc-* specialists). Yellow above $1/hr, red above $5/hr.
panels.title: 💰 What did NeonCart cost in the last hour?

panels.description: Top 10 nc-* specialists ranked by USD attributed in the last hour (gradient gauge). Tells you which agent is most expensive to run, regardless of how busy it is.
panels.title: 🔥 Which specialist is most expensive? (top 10 by cost, 1h)
📡 Sigil generation log — raw LLM calls as they happen

panels.description: Live tail of Sigil generation events emitted by the llm-gateway (Loki JSON logs), scoped to nc-* specialists and the use_case dropdown. One log = one LLM call with prompt/response/cost.
panels.title: Live generation events for this use case (use_case=$use_case)

panels.description: Latest Sigil events as structured fields (cost_usd, tokens, model). Easier to scan than the raw log tail when you want to spot expensive or slow calls at a glance.
panels.title: Latest 20 calls as a structured table
🗄 Postgres — what's happening at the database layer?

panels.description: Per-service Postgres query rate, from traces_spanmetrics_calls_total on the DB-touching tools (get_inventory, search_products, place_order, etc.).
panels.title: How busy is the DB? (queries/sec by tool)

panels.description: p95 query duration per tool (OTel span latency histograms, 5m). Spikes here usually trace to DB contention or a tool firing a missing-index query.
panels.title: Which DB-backed tool is slow? (p95 query duration)

panels.description: Live tail of Postgres errors in NeonCart and pg containers (Loki regex on error/psycopg/UndefinedColumn). During the mice-rca demo the rodent_qty column-does-not-exist error shows up here — pivot to the matching trace above to walk the span tree.
panels.title: 🚨 DB errors — the smoking gun (Loki tail)

title: AI o11y — NeonCart
